courses.name: Elementary Number Theory
topics: Divisibility: Euclidean algorithm, greatest common divisor, least common multiple
Prime numbers: infinitude of primes, prime number theorem, distribution of primes
Congruences: modular arithmetic, modular inverses, Chinese remainder theorem
Fermat's little theorem: statement, proofs, applications
Euler's theorem: Euler's totient function, generalization of Fermat
Wilson's theorem: statement, proof, applications
Quadratic residues: Legendre symbol, Jacobi symbol, quadratic reciprocity law
Diophantine equations: linear Diophantine equations, Pythagorean triples, Pell's equation

courses.name: Group Theory
topics: Groups: definition, examples (symmetric, dihedral, cyclic, matrix groups)
Subgroups: criteria, cyclic subgroups, center, normalizers
Cosets and Lagrange's theorem: index, applications
Normal subgroups and quotient groups: definition, properties, examples
Group homomorphisms: kernel, image, isomorphism theorems
Direct products: internal and external direct products
Group actions: orbit-stabilizer theorem, class equation
Sylow theorems: existence, conjugacy, number of Sylow p-subgroups

courses.name: Ring Theory
topics: Rings: definition, examples (Z, Q, R, C, polynomial rings, matrix rings)
Subrings and ideals: definition, properties, generation of ideals
Ring homomorphisms: kernel, image, isomorphism theorems
Quotient rings: construction, universal property
Prime and maximal ideals: definitions, characterizations, examples
Integral domains: zero divisors, fields of fractions
Polynomial rings: irreducibility, Eisenstein's criterion, Gauss's lemma
Unique factorization domains (UFDs): definition, examples, properties

courses.name: Fields and Galois Theory
topics: Field extensions: algebraic and transcendental extensions, degree
Splitting fields: existence, uniqueness, algebraic closure
Finite fields: construction, properties, primitive elements
Separable and inseparable extensions: perfect fields
Galois groups: definition, fundamental theorem of Galois theory
Solvability by radicals: Galois groups of polynomials, solvable groups
Cyclotomic fields: cyclotomic polynomials, Galois groups
Classical problems: impossibility of angle trisection, doubling the cube, squaring the circle

courses.name: Real Analysis
topics: Real numbers: completeness axiom, supremum and infimum, Archimedean property
Sequences: convergence, limit theorems, monotone convergence, Cauchy sequences
Series: convergence tests, absolute vs conditional convergence, rearrangement theorems
Limits of functions: epsilon-delta definition, limit laws
Continuity: epsilon-delta, intermediate value theorem, uniform continuity
Differentiability: definition, mean value theorem, Taylor's theorem
Riemann integral: definition, properties, fundamental theorem of calculus
Improper integrals: convergence criteria, comparison tests

courses.name: Complex Analysis
topics: Complex numbers: algebra, geometry, polar form, roots of unity
Analytic functions: Cauchy-Riemann equations, harmonic functions
Elementary functions: exponential, trigonometric, logarithmic, power functions
Complex integration: line integrals, Cauchy's integral theorem
Cauchy's integral formula: derivatives, maximum modulus principle
Series representations: Taylor series, Laurent series
Residue theory: residues, residue theorem, evaluation of real integrals
Conformal mapping: Möbius transformations, applications

courses.name: Advanced Calculus
topics: Metric spaces: open and closed sets, convergence, continuity, compactness, connectedness
Multivariable differentiation: partial derivatives, total derivative, chain rule
Inverse and implicit function theorems: statements, proofs, applications
Multivariable integration: Riemann integral on Rn, Fubini's theorem
Change of variables: Jacobian, applications
Line and surface integrals: parametric representations
Vector calculus theorems: Green's theorem, divergence theorem, Stokes' theorem
Differential forms: exterior derivative, wedge product, generalized Stokes' theorem

courses.name: Geometry
topics: Euclidean geometry: axioms, congruence, similarity, circles
Transformational geometry: isometries, similarities, affine transformations
Projective geometry: homogeneous coordinates, projective transformations, duality
Non-Euclidean geometry: hyperbolic geometry, Poincaré disk model
Spherical geometry: great circles, spherical triangles, area formulas
Curves and surfaces: curvature, geodesics, Gauss-Bonnet theorem
Introduction to differential geometry: manifolds, tangent spaces

courses.name: Measure and Integration
topics: Lebesgue measure: outer measure, measurable sets, properties
Measurable functions: definition, properties, approximations
Lebesgue integral: definition for simple functions, nonnegative functions, integrable functions
Convergence theorems: monotone convergence, dominated convergence, Fatou's lemma
Lp spaces: definition, completeness, inequalities (Hölder, Minkowski)
Fubini's theorem: product measures, iterated integrals
Absolutely continuous functions: Lebesgue differentiation theorem
Signed measures: Hahn decomposition, Jordan decomposition, Radon-Nikodym theorem

courses.name: Functional Analysis
topics: Normed linear spaces: Banach spaces, examples (ℓp, Lp, C[a,b])
Bounded linear operators: norm, examples, operator spaces
Hahn-Banach theorem: extensions of linear functionals, separation theorems
Uniform boundedness principle: Banach-Steinhaus theorem
Open mapping theorem: closed graph theorem, applications
Hilbert spaces: inner products, orthonormal bases, Riesz representation theorem
Spectral theory: spectrum of operators, compact operators
Applications to integral equations and differential equations

courses.name: Introduction to Partial Differential Equations
topics: Classification of PDEs: hyperbolic, parabolic, elliptic
First-order PDEs: method of characteristics, Cauchy problem
Heat equation: derivation, fundamental solution, maximum principle, energy methods
Wave equation: d'Alembert's formula, characteristics, energy conservation
Laplace's equation: harmonic functions, mean value property, Dirichlet problem
Separation of variables: eigenfunction expansions, Sturm-Liouville theory
Green's functions: representation formulas, method of images
Sobolev spaces: weak derivatives, existence of weak solutions

courses.name: Algebraic Number Theory
topics: Algebraic integers: rings of integers, integral bases, discriminants
Dedekind domains: unique factorization of ideals, ideal class group
Splitting of primes: ramification, inertia, decomposition groups
Minkowski's theorem: geometry of numbers, finiteness of class number
Dirichlet's unit theorem: structure of unit groups
Zeta functions: Dedekind zeta function, class number formula
Applications to Diophantine equations: Fermat's last theorem for regular primes

courses.name: Analytic Number Theory
topics: Dirichlet series: Riemann zeta function, Euler product, analytic continuation
Prime number theorem: statement, proof using complex analysis
Dirichlet characters: orthogonality, L-functions, Dirichlet's theorem on primes in arithmetic progressions
Sieve methods: Brun's sieve, Selberg sieve, applications
Additive number theory: Goldbach's conjecture, Waring's problem
Distribution of primes: Chebyshev functions, Riemann hypothesis

courses.name: Algebraic Geometry
topics: Affine varieties: algebraic sets, Zariski topology, Hilbert's Nullstellensatz
Projective varieties: homogeneous ideals, projective space
Morphisms of varieties: regular functions, rational maps
Dimension theory: Krull dimension, transcendence degree
Nonsingularity: tangent spaces, smooth varieties
Sheaf theory: presheaves, sheaves, structure sheaf
Schemes: affine schemes, spectrum of a ring
Applications: elliptic curves, Riemann-Roch theorem

courses.name: Topics in Number Theory
topics: Elliptic curves: Weierstrass form, group law, discriminant, j-invariant
Modular forms: definition, examples, Hecke operators, L-functions
Fermat's last theorem: Frey curves, modularity theorem, proof outline
Computational number theory: primality testing, factorization algorithms
Cryptographic applications: elliptic curve cryptography, RSA
Advanced topics: p-adic numbers, local fields, class field theory overview

courses.name: Topics in Analysis
topics: Fourier analysis: Fourier series, Fourier transforms, convergence
Wavelet theory: multiresolution analysis, Haar wavelets, Daubechies wavelets
Harmonic analysis: convolution, Calderón-Zygmund theory
Operator theory: bounded operators, spectral theorem
Banach algebras: Gelfand theory, C*-algebras
Probability theory: measure-theoretic foundations, stochastic processes

courses.name: Introduction to Differential Geometry
topics: Smooth manifolds: charts, atlases, smooth functions
Tangent spaces: tangent vectors, differentials, pushforward
Vector fields: Lie bracket, flows, integral curves
Differential forms: wedge product, exterior derivative, pullback
Integration on manifolds: orientation, Stokes' theorem
Riemannian geometry: metrics, connections, curvature
Geodesics: length, energy, geodesic completeness
Applications: general relativity, minimal surfaces

courses.name: Introduction to Topology
topics: Topological spaces: open sets, closed sets, continuity, convergence
Compactness: Heine-Borel theorem, Bolzano-Weierstrass property
Connectedness: path connectedness, components
Separation axioms: Hausdorff, regular, normal spaces
Product and quotient topologies: Tychonoff's theorem
Metric spaces: metrizability, completeness, uniform continuity
Homotopy theory: homotopy equivalence, fundamental group
Covering spaces: lifting properties, classification of coverings

courses.name: Introduction to Algebraic Topology
topics: Simplicial complexes: simplicial homology, chain complexes
Singular homology: definition, properties, computation
Homotopy groups: higher homotopy groups, Hurewicz theorem
Cohomology: cochain complexes, cup product, Poincaré duality
Exact sequences: Mayer-Vietoris, long exact sequence of a pair
Fixed point theorems: Brouwer fixed point theorem, Lefschetz fixed point theorem
Applications: Borsuk-Ulam theorem, classification of surfaces

courses.name: Functional Analysis 2
topics: Banach algebras: spectrum, Gelfand transform, maximal ideals
C*-algebras: involution, GNS construction, representations
Von Neumann algebras: weak operator topology, double commutant theorem
Spectral theory: spectral theorem for unbounded operators
Semigroups of operators: strongly continuous semigroups, Hille-Yosida theorem
Applications: quantum mechanics, partial differential equations

courses.name: Mathematical Logic
topics: Propositional logic: syntax, semantics, completeness, compactness
Predicate logic: first-order languages, structures, satisfaction
Gödel's completeness theorem: Henkin construction
Gödel's incompleteness theorems: representability, fixed point lemma
Model theory: ultraproducts, Löwenheim-Skolem theorem
Set theory: ZFC axioms, ordinal and cardinal numbers
Computability theory: recursive functions, Turing machines

courses.name: Topics in Pure Mathematics
topics: Variable topics: offered depending on faculty research interests
Possible topics: representation theory, Lie algebras, homological algebra
Advanced number theory: class field theory, modular forms
Advanced geometry: symplectic geometry, complex manifolds
Advanced analysis: harmonic analysis, PDE theory
Reading and discussion of research papers
